title: Allocation to capital and surplus, and increases and reductions thereof
doc_html:
PART VI.  CAPITAL, SURPLUS, DIVIDENDS

§61.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Added by Acts 1970, No. 50, §3, emerg. eff. June 18, 1970, at 5:05 P.M; Acts 1997, No. 914, §1; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
PART VI.  CAPITAL, SURPLUS, DIVIDENDS
§61.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Added by Acts 1970, No. 50, §3, emerg. eff. June 18, 1970, at 5:05 P.M; Acts 1997, No. 914, §1; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
